notes: Generated from octree chunk centers to follow seabed slope.
Spawn loop should enqueue all entries before control starts.
When a requested XY chunk is missing, seabed Z is estimated from nearest known chunk.
Scale and Z placement include category-specific multipliers and sink adjustments.
If chunk files are missing, roots.json leaf points are used as fallback.
Filtered world_population.json to keep only mina, siluro, ancora, rocks.
Filtered world_population.json to remove all S_Thai_Beach_Rocks entries: removed=134.
Expanded mina/siluro/ancora/rocks with wide-world offsets, unique rotations, and overlap-safe spacing.
Added coral_probe_001 as a single fixed-low coral test at effective x100 scale.
Added 96 single-mesh low seaweed probes with a new mesh, half size, fixed low Z, and wider coverage.
Added additional safe seaweed meshes and extra rocks with overlap-safe spacing; seaweed slightly enlarged.
Doubled seaweed again with additional safe meshes, slightly increased width, and re-sunk rocks_extra depths to match old rocks.
Lowered 150 high rock outliers (z > -3000.0) by 650.0 UE and added 80 seaweed probes at fixed z=-7150.0 with unchanged seaweed scale.
Remapped 287 high rocks (z > -5000.0) to the existing low-rock depth band to keep rocks on seabed level.
